name: Web Browser
description: A simple web browser application allowing users to navigate and view websites.

name: Calculator
description: A standard calculator application for performing basic to advanced arithmetic operations.

name: Snake Game
description: A classic arcade game where the player controls a growing snake to consume food while avoiding collisions.

name: Flappy Bird
description: A 2D side-scrolling game where the player navigates a flying bird through a series of pipe obstacles.

name: Pong Game
description: A retro table tennis-themed arcade game featuring two moving paddles and a bouncing ball.

name: Secure Password Generator
description: A utility tool that creates strong, randomized, and complex passwords for enhanced security.

name: QR Code Generator
description: An application that encodes user-provided text or URLs into downloadable, scannable QR code images.

name: Tic Tac Toe
description: A classic two-player turn-based strategy game played on a 3x3 grid to align three matching symbols.
